name: Military Black Ops
description: Preset Military Black Ops with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: A deniable team must prevent a cascading geopolitical crisis.
text_areas.setting: Disputed borders, clandestine labs, and proxy war zones.
text_areas.main_objective: Intercept weaponized intel before hostile deployment.
text_areas.stakes: Escalation triggers multi-state conflict and civilian disasters.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
